messages.content:
Classify the following finding into one of: missed_registration, recall_miss, memory_ignored, not_memory_related.

missed_registration: would have been prevented by a memory that was never written.
recall_miss: a relevant memory existed but autoRecallForDispatch returned 0 hits.
memory_ignored: a relevant memory was recalled but disregarded.
not_memory_related: not about memory efficacy.

Return JSON only: {"classification": "...", "reason": "..."}

Finding: [High] Bulk ingest worker acknowledges receipt before enqueueing write job; queue backpressure drops jobs silently, so expected memories are never written (performance, data_correctness).
{"classification":"missed_registration","reason":"Queue drops occur before persistence so expected memories are never stored."}

Classify the following finding into one of: missed_registration, recall_miss, memory_ignored, not_memory_related.

missed_registration: would have been prevented by a memory that was never written.
recall_miss: a relevant memory existed but autoRecallForDispatch returned 0 hits.
memory_ignored: a relevant memory was recalled but disregarded.
not_memory_related: not about memory efficacy.

Return JSON only: {"classification": "...", "reason": "..."}

Finding: [Medium] Dedup gate runs before persistence and rejects new findings sharing checksum with unrelated historical text, causing missed registration of novel failures (architect, data_correctness).
{"classification":"missed_registration","reason":"Pre-write dedup rejects a new finding and therefore the corresponding memory is never written."}

Finding: [High] The ingestion queue drops the item on timeout, so the event never persists downstream.
{"classification":"missed_registration","reason":"The ingestion queue drops the item when the worker times out, so the memory event never gets persisted downstream."}

Finding: [High] Embedding-version skew between ingestion and recall indexes causes semantically relevant memories to score below cutoff, returning zero hits on autoRecallForDispatch (architect, data_correctness).
{"classification":"recall_miss","reason":"The memory was written, but embedding/index incompatibility prevents retrieval so dispatch sees zero relevant hits."}
